content.text: The 2026 Capital Grants offer is expected to open on Thursday 30 July.
This new round will make £225 million available, which is 50% more than in 2025.
To help you prepare, we're hosting a webinar for you to find out more.
The webinar will take place on Wednesday 22 July. It will start at 2pm and finish at 3:30pm.
During the session, you'll hear from me, as well as colleagues from Catchment Sensitive Farming (CSF) (look at section 4.3), and the Rural Payments Agency (RPA).
CSF colleagues will explain which grant items may need advice before you apply, and RPA colleagues will take you through the application and claims process.
We'll finish with a Q&A session, so you can ask questions and get answers from the team.
If you can’t make it, don’t worry. We will publish a link to the recording in this post once the webinar finishes.
For more information ahead of the webinar, do read my previous posts on Capital Grants and the Capital Grants 2026 guidance on GOV.UK.
I look forward to seeing you there.
